overall.description: A nighttime drive through a foggy cyberpunk landscape in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a winding mountain road and emerging to reveal a stunning neon-lit city skyline with three prominent towers, before continuing through desert highways toward industrial structures. The footage features atmospheric fog, dramatic artificial lighting, and futuristic urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain highway through rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating a foggy mountain road with headlights cutting through the mist, hugging the left cliff face

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain forming a wall along the left side of the road
two-lane paved road with yellow dividing lines winding through the mountains
metal barrier along the right edge of the road
wooden power pole with transformers and street light attached
sparse desert vegetation and sandy terrain on the right roadside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, foggy mountain road with the vehicle driving along a curve. A steep rocky cliff face dominates the left side while a metal guardrail protects the right edge. Streetlights pierce the thick fog, illuminating the asphalt highway as it winds through the desolate terrain.

events.description: large illuminated billboard and distant neon-lit city skyline emerge from the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a curve with the city lights becoming visible in the distance, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising billboard displaying bright white light and text
distant skyscrapers with colorful vertical neon lighting visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle rounds the mountain curve, the scene opens to reveal a massive digital billboard and the distant glow of a futuristic city skyline. The rocky terrain recedes into the background while the road continues toward the urban lights piercing through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic cliffside overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: sharp right turn reveals full panoramic view of the neon-lit city with three prominent towers
flying vehicle passes through the sky above the city in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp right curve along the cliff edge with the spectacular city skyline dominating the view

entered.detail: three distinctive skyscrapers with bright vertical neon stripes in red, blue, and white
dense cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings forming the downtown skyline
futuristic aircraft with lights flying through the fog above the city
safety barrier now on the left side along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a sharp right turn, opening up a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city. Three massive neon-lit towers dominate the skyline while a flying vehicle cruises through the foggy sky. The road hugs the cliffside with guardrails protecting the left edge as the city sprawls below.

events.description: approaching busy intersection with multiple vehicles visible ahead and to the sides
merging through the intersection with other vehicles on the road

agents.ego_description: driving through a highway intersection, merging with moderate traffic flow while the city skyline remains visible ahead

notable_agents.action: car ahead slowing down and navigating the intersection
vehicle merging from the right lane into the traffic flow

entered.detail: multi-lane road junction with traffic merging from different directions
multiple cars with red tail lights visible ahead on the road
tall street light illuminating the intersection area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and navigates through a busy highway intersection with moderate traffic. Other vehicles are visible ahead and merging from the right, while the three neon towers shift to the left side of the frame. The road widens as it passes through the junction with streetlights illuminating the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with industrial structures

agents.ego_description: cruising along the straight desert highway toward industrial buildings, with minimal traffic

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple buildings and bright lighting in the distance
tall cylindrical industrial structure with red warning lights on top

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle driving along a straight desert highway leaving the city behind. Industrial structures and a tall tower with warning lights appear ahead in the fog, while the neon towers fade into the distance. The road stretches forward through the sparse desert landscape with occasional streetlights and flying vehicles visible in the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a desolate, foggy mountain pass into the heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis before receding into a sparse industrial wasteland. It begins on a dark, winding road where streetlights pierce thick fog against a steep rocky cliff and a metal guardrail. As the vehicle rounds a curve, the rocky terrain recedes to reveal a massive digital billboard and the distant, glowing silhouette of a futuristic skyline. The scene then opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of three massive neon towers and flying vehicles after a sharp right turn, before the camera navigates a busy highway intersection where the city lights shift to the periphery. Finally, the road straightens into a desert highway, leaving the glowing towers behind as industrial structures and a warning-lit tower emerge through the lingering fog.
